headline: Senior staff engineer building AI-powered preconstruction software for general contractors
title: Staff Software Engineer
confidenceNote: LinkedIn and GitHub corroborate identity, Buildr affiliation, senior/staff engineering level, and Santa Barbara location; exact event-provided title is slightly lower than LinkedIn's senior staff wording.
bioMarkdown: Senior/staff software engineer at Buildr, an AI-powered preconstruction platform for general contractors. Useful match for conversations on construction CRM, estimating workflows, workforce planning, and product engineering for vertical SaaS.

headline: AI strategist and solutions architect focused on scalable AI-native business systems

bioMarkdown: AI strategist and solutions architect working on scalable AI-native workflows. Brings founder experience across edtech, go-to-market automation, and applied AI consulting; useful match for AI systems, sales/product automation, and practical enterprise adoption.
